description: A closed deal with a longer-than-standard usage window and a stated reason proposes a playbook update with quoted evidence.

off_standard_terms.reason_accepted: large brand, fee covered the extended window

expect.header: starts with RESEARCH NOTES. NOT LEGAL ADVICE.
expect.off_standard_findings: quotes the 12-month value and the stated reason
expect.proposed_playbook_updates: proposes update_standard or note_exception with a labeled rationale

description: An off-standard term with no stated reason keeps reason_accepted null and flagged, never invents a motive.

expect.off_standard_findings: reason_accepted null and flagged in retrieval_gaps
expect.proposed_playbook_updates: may propose note_exception with lower confidence

description: A deal that has not closed is refused with a flag.

expect.retrieval_gaps: flags that the deal has not closed; debrief runs on closed deals

prohibit: debriefing an open deal as if closed

description: Neither deal_id nor closed_deal_summary returns a structured error.

expect.message: present, asks for deal_id or closed_deal_summary
